logger.doc:name: Start Logger
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CoreelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: started get covid case by national ID flow, #[payload]

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- [ { registrationId: "12345", source: "Hospital1", caseType: "positive", firstName: "John", lastName: "Nixon", phone: "541-754-3010", email: "john.nixon@example.com", dateOfBirth: "1989-04-26", nationalID: "209-49-6193", nationalIDType: "SSN", address: { streetAddress: "1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW", city: "Washington", state: "DC", postal: "20500", country: "USA" }, createdAt: "2024-06-01T12:00:00Z", updatedAt: "2024-06-01T12:00:00Z" }, { registrationId: "67890", source: "Hospital2", caseType: "negative", firstName: "John", lastName: "Nixon", phone: "541-754-3010", email: "john.nixon@example.com", dateOfBirth: "1989-04-26", nationalID: "209-49-6193", nationalIDType: "SSN", address: { streetAddress: "1600 Pennsylvania Avenue NW", city: "Washington", state: "DC", postal: "20500", country: "USA" }, createdAt: "2024-07-01T12:00:00Z", updatedAt: "2024-09-01T12:00:00Z" } ] as Array {encoding: "UTF-8", mediaType: "application/json"}

flow-ref.doc:name: Get Cases By National ID Flow Reference
flow-ref.name: get-covid-case-by-national-iduhub-dbSub_Flow

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- ((payload default []) as Array) map (covidCase, indexOfCase) -> { "registrationId": covidCase.registration_id, "source": covidCase.source, "caseType": covidCase.case_type, "firstName": covidCase.firstName, "lastName": covidCase.last_name, "phone": covidCase.phone, "email": covidCase.email, "dateOfBirth": covidCase.date_of_birth as String, "nationalID": covidCase.national_id, "nationalIDType": covidCase.national_id_type, "address": { "streetAddress": covidCase.street_address, "city": covidCase.city, "state": covidCase.state, "postal": covidCase.postal, "country": covidCase.country } }

%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { "code": 404, "message": "Resource Not Found", "description": "There are no results for the inputed Id", "datetime": now() as String, "transaction-id": vars.transactionId }

logger.doc:name: End Logger
logger.message: transactionID: #[vars.transactionId], CoreelationID: #[vars.correlationId], message: finished get covid case by national ID flow, #[payload]
